+-- name: GetUser :one
+SELECT
+    user_id,
+    nickname,
+    introduce
+FROM
+    users
+WHERE
+    users.user_id = @UserID :: UUID;
+
+-- name: UpdateUser :exec
+UPDATE
+    users
+SET
+    nickname = @Nickname,
+    introduce = @Introduce
+WHERE
+    users.user_id = @UserID :: UUID;
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.go b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4efda64
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.go
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
+	"net/http"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+	libauth "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/response"
+)
+
+type updateUserUsecase interface {
+	Execute(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID, nickname, introduce string) error
+}
+
+type UpdateUserHandler struct {
+	usecase  updateUserUsecase
+	verifier *libauth.Verifier
+}
+
+func NewUpdateUserHandler(usecase updateUserUsecase, verifier *libauth.Verifier) *UpdateUserHandler {
+	return &UpdateUserHandler{usecase: usecase, verifier: verifier}
+}
+
+func (h *UpdateUserHandler) PatchUserHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+
+	token, err := libauth.ExtractBearerToken(r)
+	if err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "UNAUTHORIZED", "unauthorized")
+		return
+	}
+
+	jwtUserID, err := h.verifier.GetUserID(token)
+	if err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "UNAUTHORIZED", "unauthorized")
+		return
+	}
+
+	pathUserID := r.PathValue("userID")
+	if jwtUserID != pathUserID {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusForbidden, "FORBIDDEN", "forbidden")
+		return
+	}
+
+	userID, err := uuid.Parse(pathUserID)
+	if err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "userID must be a valid UUID")
+		return
+	}
+
+	var body struct {
+		Nickname  string `json:"nickname"`
+		Introduce string `json:"introduce"`
+	}
+	defer r.Body.Close()
+	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "body must be valid JSON")
+		return
+	}
+
+	if err := h.usecase.Execute(r.Context(), userID, body.Nickname, body.Introduce); err != nil {
+		switch {
+		case errors.Is(err, ErrValidation):
+			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, err.Error())
+		case errors.Is(err, ErrUserNotFound):
+			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusNotFound, "USER_NOT_FOUND", "user not found")
+		default:
+			response.WriteInternalServerErrorResponse(w)
+		}
+		return
+	}
+
+	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{
+		"nickname":  body.Nickname,
+		"introduce": body.Introduce,
+	})
+}
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.small.server_test.go b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.small.server_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..92c1f99
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.small.server_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,133 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"net/http"
+	"net/http/httptest"
+	"strings"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+
+	"fmt"
+
+	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+)
+
+const testSecret = "test-secret"
+const testUserID = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
+const otherUserID = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002"
+
+func newTestVerifier(t *testing.T) *auth.Verifier {
+	t.Helper()
+	srv := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]any{"keys": []any{}})
+	}))
+	t.Cleanup(srv.Close)
+	return auth.NewVerifier(testSecret, srv.URL)
+}
+
+func signToken(t *testing.T, sub string, expired bool) string {
+	t.Helper()
+	exp := time.Now().Add(time.Hour)
+	if expired {
+		exp = time.Now().Add(-time.Hour)
+	}
+	token, err := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, jwt.MapClaims{
+		"sub": sub,
+		"exp": exp.Unix(),
+	}).SignedString([]byte(testSecret))
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	return token
+}
+
+type mockUpdateUsecase struct{ err error }
+
+func (m *mockUpdateUsecase) Execute(_ context.Context, _ uuid.UUID, _, _ string) error {
+	return m.err
+}
+
+func newPatchRequest(t *testing.T, userID, body, token string) *http.Request {
+	t.Helper()
+	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPatch, "/v1/users/"+userID, strings.NewReader(body))
+	req.SetPathValue("userID", userID)
+	if token != "" {
+		req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+token)
+	}
+	return req
+}
+
+func decodeStringMap(t *testing.T, w *httptest.ResponseRecorder) map[string]string {
+	t.Helper()
+	var body map[string]string
+	if err := json.NewDecoder(w.Result().Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("レスポンスボディのデコードに失敗しました: %v", err)
+	}
+	return body
+}
+
+func TestPatchUserHandler(t *testing.T) {
+	validBody := `{"nickname":"テスト","introduce":"自己紹介"}`
+
+	t.Run("Authorizationヘッダーがない場合401を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, validBody, ""))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("不正なトークンの場合401を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, validBody, "invalid.token"))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("JWTのuserIDとパスのuserIDが異なる場合403を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, otherUserID, false)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, validBody, token))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusForbidden, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("userIDがUUID形式でない場合400を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, "not-a-uuid", false)
+		req := newPatchRequest(t, "not-a-uuid", validBody, token)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, req)
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("リクエストボディが不正なJSONの場合400を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, testUserID, false)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, "invalid-json", token))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("バリデーションエラーの場合400を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{err: fmt.Errorf("%w: nickname too short", ErrValidation)}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, testUserID, false)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, `{"nickname":"valid","introduce":""}`, token))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("正常な場合200とnickname・introduceを返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, testUserID, false)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, validBody, token))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Result().StatusCode)
+		body := decodeStringMap(t, w)
+		assert.Equal(t, "テスト", body["nickname"])
+		assert.Equal(t, "自己紹介", body["introduce"])
+	})
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"errors"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+)
+
+var ErrUserNotFound = errors.New("user not found")
+
+type UpdateUserRepository interface {
+	Get(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID) (User, error)
+	Update(ctx context.Context, user User) error
+}
+
+type UpdateUserUsecase struct {
+	repo UpdateUserRepository
+}
+
+func NewUpdateUserUsecase(repo UpdateUserRepository) *UpdateUserUsecase {
+	return &UpdateUserUsecase{repo: repo}
+}
+
+func (uc *UpdateUserUsecase) Execute(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID, nickname, introduce string) error {
+	user, err := uc.repo.Get(ctx, userID)
+	if err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+
+	if err := user.UpdateProfile(nickname, introduce); err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+
+	return uc.repo.Update(ctx, user)
+}
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.go b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7c5cd43
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.go
@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"errors"
+	"fmt"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+)
+
+var ErrValidation = errors.New("validation error")
+
+type User struct {
+	userID    uuid.UUID
+	nickname  string
+	introduce string
+}
+
+type UserDto struct {
+	UserID    uuid.UUID
+	Nickname  string
+	Introduce string
+}
+
+func UserFromDto(dto UserDto) User {
+	return User{
+		userID:    dto.UserID,
+		nickname:  dto.Nickname,
+		introduce: dto.Introduce,
+	}
+}
+
+func (u *User) UpdateProfile(nickname, introduce string) error {
+	nicknameRunes := []rune(nickname)
+	if len(nicknameRunes) < 1 || len(nicknameRunes) > 50 {
+		return fmt.Errorf("%w: nickname must be between 1 and 50 characters", ErrValidation)
+	}
+
+	introduceRunes := []rune(introduce)
+	if len(introduceRunes) > 500 {
+		return fmt.Errorf("%w: introduce must be 500 characters or less", ErrValidation)
+	}
+
+	u.nickname = nickname
+	u.introduce = introduce
+	return nil
+}
+
+func (u User) ToDto() UserDto {
+	return UserDto{
+		UserID:    u.userID,
+		Nickname:  u.nickname,
+		Introduce: u.introduce,
+	}
+}

+package commands
+
+import (
+	"strings"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+)
+
+func TestUpdateProfile(t *testing.T) {
+	validUserID := uuid.MustParse("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001")
+
+	newUser := func() User {
+		return UserFromDto(UserDto{
+			UserID:    validUserID,
+			Nickname:  "テスト",
+			Introduce: "",
+		})
+	}
+
+	t.Run("正常な値で更新できる", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("更新後", "自己紹介")
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+		dto := u.ToDto()
+		assert.Equal(t, "更新後", dto.Nickname)
+		assert.Equal(t, "自己紹介", dto.Introduce)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("nicknameが空の場合エラーを返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("", "")
+		assert.Error(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("nicknameが50文字の場合成功する", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile(strings.Repeat("あ", 50), "")
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("nicknameが51文字の場合エラーを返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile(strings.Repeat("あ", 51), "")
+		assert.Error(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("introduceが500文字の場合成功する", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("テスト", strings.Repeat("あ", 500))
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("introduceが501文字の場合エラーを返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("テスト", strings.Repeat("あ", 501))
+		assert.Error(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("introduceが空の場合成功する", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("テスト", "")
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+	})
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"errors"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
+)
+
+type userQuerier interface {
+	GetUser(ctx context.Context, userid pgtype.UUID) (db.GetUserRow, error)
+	UpdateUser(ctx context.Context, arg db.UpdateUserParams) error
+}
+
+type UserSqrcRepository struct {
+	q userQuerier
+}
+
+func NewUserSqrcRepository(q userQuerier) *UserSqrcRepository {
+	return &UserSqrcRepository{q: q}
+}
+
+func (r *UserSqrcRepository) Get(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID) (User, error) {
+	var uid pgtype.UUID
+	_ = uid.Scan(userID.String())
+
+	row, err := r.q.GetUser(ctx, uid)
+	if err != nil {
+		if errors.Is(err, pgx.ErrNoRows) {
+			return User{}, ErrUserNotFound
+		}
+		return User{}, err
+	}
+
+	return UserFromDto(UserDto{
+		UserID:    userID,
+		Nickname:  row.Nickname,
+		Introduce: row.Introduce,
+	}), nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserSqrcRepository) Update(ctx context.Context, user User) error {
+	dto := user.ToDto()
+	var uid pgtype.UUID
+	_ = uid.Scan(dto.UserID.String())
+
+	return r.q.UpdateUser(ctx, db.UpdateUserParams{
+		Nickname:  dto.Nickname,
+		Introduce: dto.Introduce,
+		Userid:    uid,
+	})
+}

+package queries
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
+	"log"
+	"net/http"
+
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/response"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
+)
+
+type GetUserQuery interface {
+	GetUser(ctx context.Context, userid pgtype.UUID) (db.GetUserRow, error)
+}
+
+type GetUserHandler struct {
+	query GetUserQuery
+}
+
+func NewGetUserHandler(q GetUserQuery) *GetUserHandler {
+	return &GetUserHandler{query: q}
+}
+
+type GetUserResponse struct {
+	Nickname  string `json:"nickname"`
+	Introduce string `json:"introduce"`
+}
+
+func (h *GetUserHandler) GetUserHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+
+	var userID pgtype.UUID
+	if err := userID.Scan(r.PathValue("userID")); err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "userID must be a valid UUID")
+		return
+	}
+
+	user, err := h.query.GetUser(r.Context(), userID)
+	if err != nil {
+		if errors.Is(err, pgx.ErrNoRows) {
+			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusNotFound, "USER_NOT_FOUND", "user not found")
+			return
+		}
+		log.Printf("GetUser error: %v", err)
+		response.WriteInternalServerErrorResponse(w)
+		return
+	}
+
+	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(GetUserResponse{
+		Nickname:  user.Nickname,
+		Introduce: user.Introduce,
+	})
+}

+package queries
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
+	"net/http"
+	"net/http/httptest"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+)
+
+const validUserID = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
+
+type mockGetUserQuery struct {
+	row db.GetUserRow
+	err error
+}
+
+func (m *mockGetUserQuery) GetUser(_ context.Context, _ pgtype.UUID) (db.GetUserRow, error) {
+	return m.row, m.err
+}
+
+func decodeBody(t *testing.T, w *httptest.ResponseRecorder) map[string]string {
+	t.Helper()
+	var body map[string]string
+	if err := json.NewDecoder(w.Result().Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("レスポンスボディのデコードに失敗しました: %v", err)
+	}
+	return body
+}
+
+func newGetUserRequest(t *testing.T, userID string) *http.Request {
+	t.Helper()
+	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/v1/users/"+userID, nil)
+	req.SetPathValue("userID", userID)
+	return req
+}
+
+func TestGetUserHandler(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Run("userIDがUUID形式でない場合400を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewGetUserHandler(&mockGetUserQuery{})
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.GetUserHandler(w, newGetUserRequest(t, "invalid-uuid"))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Result().StatusCode)
+		body := decodeBody(t, w)
+		assert.Equal(t, "INPUT_VALIDATION_ERROR", body["errorCode"])
+	})
+
+	t.Run("ユーザーが存在しない場合404を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewGetUserHandler(&mockGetUserQuery{err: pgx.ErrNoRows})
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.GetUserHandler(w, newGetUserRequest(t, validUserID))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusNotFound, w.Result().StatusCode)
+		body := decodeBody(t, w)
+		assert.Equal(t, "USER_NOT_FOUND", body["errorCode"])
+	})
+
+	t.Run("DBエラーの場合500を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewGetUserHandler(&mockGetUserQuery{err: errors.New("db error")})
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.GetUserHandler(w, newGetUserRequest(t, validUserID))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusInternalServerError, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("正常な場合200とユーザー情報を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewGetUserHandler(&mockGetUserQuery{
+			row: db.GetUserRow{Nickname: "テスト", Introduce: "自己紹介"},
+		})
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.GetUserHandler(w, newGetUserRequest(t, validUserID))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Result().StatusCode)
+		body := decodeBody(t, w)
+		assert.Equal(t, "テスト", body["nickname"])
+		assert.Equal(t, "自己紹介", body["introduce"])
+	})

@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
+	"net/http"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+	libauth "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/response"
+)
+
+type updateUserUsecase interface {
+	Execute(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID, nickname, introduce string) error
+}
+
+type UpdateUserHandler struct {
+	usecase  updateUserUsecase
+	verifier *libauth.Verifier
+}
+
+func NewUpdateUserHandler(usecase updateUserUsecase, verifier *libauth.Verifier) *UpdateUserHandler {
+	return &UpdateUserHandler{usecase: usecase, verifier: verifier}
+}
+
+func (h *UpdateUserHandler) PatchUserHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+
+	token, err := libauth.ExtractBearerToken(r)
+	if err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "UNAUTHORIZED", "unauthorized")
+		return
+	}
+
+	jwtUserID, err := h.verifier.GetUserID(token)
+	if err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "UNAUTHORIZED", "unauthorized")
+		return
+	}
+
+	pathUserID := r.PathValue("userID")
+	if jwtUserID != pathUserID {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusForbidden, "FORBIDDEN", "forbidden")
+		return
+	}
+
+	userID, err := uuid.Parse(pathUserID)
+	if err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "userID must be a valid UUID")
+		return
+	}
+
+	var body struct {
+		Nickname  string `json:"nickname"`
+		Introduce string `json:"introduce"`
+	}
+	defer r.Body.Close()
+	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "body must be valid JSON")
+		return
+	}
+
+	if err := h.usecase.Execute(r.Context(), userID, body.Nickname, body.Introduce); err != nil {
+		switch {
+		case errors.Is(err, ErrValidation):
+			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, err.Error())
+		case errors.Is(err, ErrUserNotFound):
+			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusNotFound, "USER_NOT_FOUND", "user not found")
+		default:
+			response.WriteInternalServerErrorResponse(w)
+		}
+		return
+	}
+
+	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{
+		"nickname":  body.Nickname,
+		"introduce": body.Introduce,
+	})
+}
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.small.server_test.go b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.small.server_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..92c1f99
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.small.server_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,133 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"net/http"
+	"net/http/httptest"
+	"strings"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+
+	"fmt"
+
+	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+)
+
+const testSecret = "test-secret"
+const testUserID = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
+const otherUserID = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002"
+
+func newTestVerifier(t *testing.T) *auth.Verifier {
+	t.Helper()
+	srv := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]any{"keys": []any{}})
+	}))
+	t.Cleanup(srv.Close)
+	return auth.NewVerifier(testSecret, srv.URL)
+}
+
+func signToken(t *testing.T, sub string, expired bool) string {
+	t.Helper()
+	exp := time.Now().Add(time.Hour)
+	if expired {
+		exp = time.Now().Add(-time.Hour)
+	}
+	token, err := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, jwt.MapClaims{
+		"sub": sub,
+		"exp": exp.Unix(),
+	}).SignedString([]byte(testSecret))
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	return token
+}
+
+type mockUpdateUsecase struct{ err error }
+
+func (m *mockUpdateUsecase) Execute(_ context.Context, _ uuid.UUID, _, _ string) error {
+	return m.err
+}
+
+func newPatchRequest(t *testing.T, userID, body, token string) *http.Request {
+	t.Helper()
+	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPatch, "/v1/users/"+userID, strings.NewReader(body))
+	req.SetPathValue("userID", userID)
+	if token != "" {
+		req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+token)
+	}
+	return req
+}
+
+func decodeStringMap(t *testing.T, w *httptest.ResponseRecorder) map[string]string {
+	t.Helper()
+	var body map[string]string
+	if err := json.NewDecoder(w.Result().Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("レスポンスボディのデコードに失敗しました: %v", err)
+	}
+	return body
+}
+
+func TestPatchUserHandler(t *testing.T) {
+	validBody := `{"nickname":"テスト","introduce":"自己紹介"}`
+
+	t.Run("Authorizationヘッダーがない場合401を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, validBody, ""))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("不正なトークンの場合401を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, validBody, "invalid.token"))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("JWTのuserIDとパスのuserIDが異なる場合403を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, otherUserID, false)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, validBody, token))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusForbidden, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("userIDがUUID形式でない場合400を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, "not-a-uuid", false)
+		req := newPatchRequest(t, "not-a-uuid", validBody, token)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, req)
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("リクエストボディが不正なJSONの場合400を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, testUserID, false)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, "invalid-json", token))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("バリデーションエラーの場合400を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{err: fmt.Errorf("%w: nickname too short", ErrValidation)}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, testUserID, false)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, `{"nickname":"valid","introduce":""}`, token))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("正常な場合200とnickname・introduceを返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewUpdateUserHandler(&mockUpdateUsecase{}, newTestVerifier(t))
+		token := signToken(t, testUserID, false)
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.PatchUserHandler(w, newPatchRequest(t, testUserID, validBody, token))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Result().StatusCode)
+		body := decodeStringMap(t, w)
+		assert.Equal(t, "テスト", body["nickname"])
+		assert.Equal(t, "自己紹介", body["introduce"])
+	})
+}
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.usecase.go b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.usecase.go

+++ b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.usecase.go
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"errors"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+)
+
+var ErrUserNotFound = errors.New("user not found")
+
+type UpdateUserRepository interface {
+	Get(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID) (User, error)
+	Update(ctx context.Context, user User) error
+}
+
+type UpdateUserUsecase struct {
+	repo UpdateUserRepository
+}
+
+func NewUpdateUserUsecase(repo UpdateUserRepository) *UpdateUserUsecase {
+	return &UpdateUserUsecase{repo: repo}
+}
+
+func (uc *UpdateUserUsecase) Execute(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID, nickname, introduce string) error {
+	user, err := uc.repo.Get(ctx, userID)
+	if err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+
+	if err := user.UpdateProfile(nickname, introduce); err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+
+	return uc.repo.Update(ctx, user)
+}
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.go b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7c5cd43
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.go
@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+package commands
+
+import (
+	"errors"
+	"fmt"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+)
+
+var ErrValidation = errors.New("validation error")
+
+type User struct {
+	userID    uuid.UUID
+	nickname  string
+	introduce string
+}
+
+type UserDto struct {
+	UserID    uuid.UUID
+	Nickname  string
+	Introduce string
+}
+
+func UserFromDto(dto UserDto) User {
+	return User{
+		userID:    dto.UserID,
+		nickname:  dto.Nickname,
+		introduce: dto.Introduce,
+	}
+}
+
+func (u *User) UpdateProfile(nickname, introduce string) error {
+	nicknameRunes := []rune(nickname)
+	if len(nicknameRunes) < 1 || len(nicknameRunes) > 50 {
+		return fmt.Errorf("%w: nickname must be between 1 and 50 characters", ErrValidation)
+	}
+
+	introduceRunes := []rune(introduce)
+	if len(introduceRunes) > 500 {
+		return fmt.Errorf("%w: introduce must be 500 characters or less", ErrValidation)
+	}
+
+	u.nickname = nickname
+	u.introduce = introduce
+	return nil
+}
+
+func (u User) ToDto() UserDto {
+	return UserDto{
+		UserID:    u.userID,
+		Nickname:  u.nickname,
+		Introduce: u.introduce,
+	}
+}
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.small.server_test.go b/apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.small.server_test.go

+package commands
+
+import (
+	"strings"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+)
+
+func TestUpdateProfile(t *testing.T) {
+	validUserID := uuid.MustParse("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001")
+
+	newUser := func() User {
+		return UserFromDto(UserDto{
+			UserID:    validUserID,
+			Nickname:  "テスト",
+			Introduce: "",
+		})
+	}
+
+	t.Run("正常な値で更新できる", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("更新後", "自己紹介")
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+		dto := u.ToDto()
+		assert.Equal(t, "更新後", dto.Nickname)
+		assert.Equal(t, "自己紹介", dto.Introduce)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("nicknameが空の場合エラーを返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("", "")
+		assert.Error(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("nicknameが50文字の場合成功する", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile(strings.Repeat("あ", 50), "")
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("nicknameが51文字の場合エラーを返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile(strings.Repeat("あ", 51), "")
+		assert.Error(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("introduceが500文字の場合成功する", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("テスト", strings.Repeat("あ", 500))
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("introduceが501文字の場合エラーを返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("テスト", strings.Repeat("あ", 501))
+		assert.Error(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("introduceが空の場合成功する", func(t *testing.T) {
+		u := newUser()
+		err := u.UpdateProfile("テスト", "")
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+	})
+}

+package commands
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"errors"
+
+	"github.com/google/uuid"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
+)
+
+type userQuerier interface {
+	GetUser(ctx context.Context, userid pgtype.UUID) (db.GetUserRow, error)
+	UpdateUser(ctx context.Context, arg db.UpdateUserParams) error
+}
+
+type UserSqrcRepository struct {
+	q userQuerier
+}
+
+func NewUserSqrcRepository(q userQuerier) *UserSqrcRepository {
+	return &UserSqrcRepository{q: q}
+}
+
+func (r *UserSqrcRepository) Get(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID) (User, error) {
+	var uid pgtype.UUID
+	_ = uid.Scan(userID.String())
+
+	row, err := r.q.GetUser(ctx, uid)
+	if err != nil {
+		if errors.Is(err, pgx.ErrNoRows) {
+			return User{}, ErrUserNotFound
+		}
+		return User{}, err
+	}
+
+	return UserFromDto(UserDto{
+		UserID:    userID,
+		Nickname:  row.Nickname,
+		Introduce: row.Introduce,
+	}), nil
+}
+
+func (r *UserSqrcRepository) Update(ctx context.Context, user User) error {
+	dto := user.ToDto()
+	var uid pgtype.UUID
+	_ = uid.Scan(dto.UserID.String())
+
+	return r.q.UpdateUser(ctx, db.UpdateUserParams{
+		Nickname:  dto.Nickname,
+		Introduce: dto.Introduce,
+		Userid:    uid,
+	})
+}
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.go b/apps/api/routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..084c8ec
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/api/routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.go
@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+package queries
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
+	"log"
+	"net/http"
+
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/response"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
+)
+
+type GetUserQuery interface {
+	GetUser(ctx context.Context, userid pgtype.UUID) (db.GetUserRow, error)
+}
+
+type GetUserHandler struct {
+	query GetUserQuery
+}
+
+func NewGetUserHandler(q GetUserQuery) *GetUserHandler {
+	return &GetUserHandler{query: q}
+}
+
+type GetUserResponse struct {
+	Nickname  string `json:"nickname"`
+	Introduce string `json:"introduce"`
+}
+
+func (h *GetUserHandler) GetUserHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+
+	var userID pgtype.UUID
+	if err := userID.Scan(r.PathValue("userID")); err != nil {
+		response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "userID must be a valid UUID")
+		return
+	}
+
+	user, err := h.query.GetUser(r.Context(), userID)
+	if err != nil {
+		if errors.Is(err, pgx.ErrNoRows) {
+			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusNotFound, "USER_NOT_FOUND", "user not found")
+			return
+		}
+		log.Printf("GetUser error: %v", err)
+		response.WriteInternalServerErrorResponse(w)
+		return
+	}
+
+	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(GetUserResponse{
+		Nickname:  user.Nickname,
+		Introduce: user.Introduce,
+	})
+}
diff --git a/apps/api/routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.small.server_test.go b/apps/api/routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.small.server_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..54a80ee
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/api/routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.small.server_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+package queries
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
+	"net/http"
+	"net/http/httptest"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+)
+
+const validUserID = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
+
+type mockGetUserQuery struct {
+	row db.GetUserRow
+	err error
+}
+
+func (m *mockGetUserQuery) GetUser(_ context.Context, _ pgtype.UUID) (db.GetUserRow, error) {
+	return m.row, m.err
+}
+
+func decodeBody(t *testing.T, w *httptest.ResponseRecorder) map[string]string {
+	t.Helper()
+	var body map[string]string
+	if err := json.NewDecoder(w.Result().Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("レスポンスボディのデコードに失敗しました: %v", err)
+	}
+	return body
+}
+
+func newGetUserRequest(t *testing.T, userID string) *http.Request {
+	t.Helper()
+	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/v1/users/"+userID, nil)
+	req.SetPathValue("userID", userID)
+	return req
+}
+
+func TestGetUserHandler(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Run("userIDがUUID形式でない場合400を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewGetUserHandler(&mockGetUserQuery{})
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.GetUserHandler(w, newGetUserRequest(t, "invalid-uuid"))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Result().StatusCode)
+		body := decodeBody(t, w)
+		assert.Equal(t, "INPUT_VALIDATION_ERROR", body["errorCode"])
+	})
+
+	t.Run("ユーザーが存在しない場合404を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewGetUserHandler(&mockGetUserQuery{err: pgx.ErrNoRows})
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.GetUserHandler(w, newGetUserRequest(t, validUserID))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusNotFound, w.Result().StatusCode)
+		body := decodeBody(t, w)
+		assert.Equal(t, "USER_NOT_FOUND", body["errorCode"])
+	})
+
+	t.Run("DBエラーの場合500を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewGetUserHandler(&mockGetUserQuery{err: errors.New("db error")})
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.GetUserHandler(w, newGetUserRequest(t, validUserID))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusInternalServerError, w.Result().StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("正常な場合200とユーザー情報を返す", func(t *testing.T) {
+		h := NewGetUserHandler(&mockGetUserQuery{
+			row: db.GetUserRow{Nickname: "テスト", Introduce: "自己紹介"},
+		})
+		w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+		h.GetUserHandler(w, newGetUserRequest(t, validUserID))
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Result().StatusCode)
+		body := decodeBody(t, w)
+		assert.Equal(t, "テスト", body["nickname"])
+		assert.Equal(t, "自己紹介", body["introduce"])
+	})
+}

プロフィール設定ページを作成する

## 詳細

ユーザーメニューの「設定」から遷移できる `/settings` ページを作成する。
設定ページのトップ（`/settings`）はプロフィール設定ページとし、nickname と自己紹介（introduce）を入力・保存できるようにする。

フォームは `@tanstack/react-form`（未導入）と `valibot`（導入済み）を使用し、クライアントサイドバリデーションを実施する。

DB の users テーブルには nickname しか存在しないため、マイグレーションファイルを追加して introduce カラム（TEXT 型、NULL 許容）を追加する。

データの読み取り・更新はサーバーアクション経由で API を呼び出す。
GO の API は以下のエンドポイントを作成する：

* `GET /v1/users/{userID}` : プロフィール情報取得
* `PATCH /v1/users/{userID}` : プロフィール情報更新

認証は既存の JWT 認証ミドルウェアを使用する。PATCH は JWT のユーザー ID とパスの userID が一致する場合のみ許可する。

- [ ] `@tanstack/react-form` パッケージを導入する

- [x] `GET /v1/users/{userID}` ハンドラーを実装する
- [x] `PATCH /v1/users/{userID}` ハンドラーを実装する
- [ ] `/settings` ページ（プロフィール設定フォーム）を作成する
- [ ] tanstack form + valibot でクライアントバリデーションを実装する
- [ ] サーバーアクションを実装する（GET / PATCH API 呼び出し）

## やらないこと

- [ ] アバター画像のアップロード機能（別チケット）
- [ ] 設定ページ内のサイドバーナビゲーション（プロフィール・APIキー等のタブ/サイドバー統合）

## 設計

### DB

* `introduce` カラム：`TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''''''` で追加（NULL 不許可、デフォルト空文字）

| フィールド | ルール |

| introduce | 0〜500文字 |

### API

  * レスポンス: `{ nickname: string, introduce: string }`
  * JWT から user\_id を取得してDBから取得
* `PATCH /v1/users/{userID}`
  * リクエストボディ: `{ nickname: string, introduce: string }`

  * sqlc クエリは `:exec`（RETURNING 不要）
  * JWT の user\_id とパスの userID が一致しない場合は 403 を返す

### Web

* URL: `/settings`（既存のユーザーメニューのリンク先と一致）
* フォームライブラリ: `@tanstack/react-form` + `valibot`

* 保存: フォーム送信時にサーバーアクション経由で `PATCH /v1/users/{userID}` を呼ぶ
* フィードバック: 保存成功時はトースト通知、失敗時はフォーム内エラーメッセージ

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   Branch `86exb4ex0` corresponds to ClickUp ticket "プロフィール設定ページ作成". The overall goal is to:
   - Add `introduce` column to users table (migration 000005: `TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`)
   - Implement `GET /v1/users/{userID}` and `PATCH /v1/users/{userID}` API endpoints in Go
   - Implement `/settings` page in Next.js with @tanstack/react-form + valibot
   - User writes SQL queries themselves; Claude creates file structure and implements handlers/usecases/entities
   - No migrations are run by Claude (user runs `make migrate-up`)

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - CQRS pattern: `routes/users/queries/` for GET (direct sqlc), `routes/users/commands/` for PATCH (handler → usecase → entity → repository)
   - sqlc for type-safe DB queries
   - JWT authentication via Supabase (HMAC or ECDSA); `GetUserID()` extracts `sub` claim
   - Entity pattern: `UserFromDto` (restore without validation) + `UpdateProfile` (validation) + `ToDto` (export)
   - Sentinel errors: `ErrValidation`, `ErrUserNotFound` for handler-level error discrimination
   - Server Components (Next.js) call regular async functions for data fetching; Server Actions for mutations
   - @tanstack/react-form + valibot for client-side form validation
   - Test naming: `*.small.server_test.go` for unit tests with mocks

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - `apps/api/migrations/000005_add_introduce_to_users.up.sql`
     - Written by user: `ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN introduce TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '';`

   - `apps/api/queries/users.sql`
     - Written by user:
     ```sql
     -- name: GetUser :one
     SELECT user_id, nickname, introduce FROM users WHERE users.user_id = @UserID :: UUID;
     -- name: UpdateUser :exec
     UPDATE users SET nickname = @Nickname, introduce = @Introduce WHERE users.user_id = @UserID :: UUID;
     ```
     - `:exec` chosen (not `:one` with RETURNING) because response values are already known from request

   - `apps/api/internal/db/users.sql.go` (sqlc generated)
     - `GetUserRow { UserID pgtype.UUID; Nickname string; Introduce string }`
     - `UpdateUserParams { Nickname string; Introduce string; Userid pgtype.UUID }`
     - `func (q *Queries) GetUser(ctx, userid) (GetUserRow, error)`
     - `func (q *Queries) UpdateUser(ctx, arg UpdateUserParams) error`

   - `apps/api/internal/db/models.go` (sqlc generated)
     - `User` struct gained `Introduce string` field

   - `apps/api/internal/db/querier.go` (sqlc generated)
     - Added `GetUser` and `UpdateUser` to `Querier` interface

   - `apps/api/lib/auth/jwt.go`
     - Added `GetUserID(tokenString string) (string, error)` method to `Verifier`
     - Parses JWT, extracts `sub` claim as user ID string

   - `apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.go`
     ```go
     var ErrValidation = errors.New("validation error")
     type User struct { userID uuid.UUID; nickname string; introduce string }
     type UserDto struct { UserID uuid.UUID; Nickname string; Introduce string }
     func UserFromDto(dto UserDto) User  // no validation, DB restore
     func (u *User) UpdateProfile(nickname, introduce string) error  // validates: nickname 1-50, introduce 0-500
     func (u User) ToDto() UserDto  // returns all fields (replaces individual getters)
     ```

   - `apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.usecase.go`
     ```go
     var ErrUserNotFound = errors.New("user not found")
     type UpdateUserRepository interface {
         Get(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID) (User, error)
         Update(ctx context.Context, user User) error
     }
     func (uc *UpdateUserUsecase) Execute(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID, nickname, introduce string) error
     // 1. repo.Get(userID) → if ErrNoRows → ErrUserNotFound
     // 2. user.UpdateProfile(nickname, introduce) → returns ErrValidation-wrapped error
     // 3. repo.Update(user)
     ```

   - `apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.sqrc-repository.go`
     ```go
     type userQuerier interface {
         GetUser(ctx context.Context, userid pgtype.UUID) (db.GetUserRow, error)
         UpdateUser(ctx context.Context, arg db.UpdateUserParams) error
     }
     func (r *UserSqrcRepository) Get(ctx, userID uuid.UUID) (User, error)
     // wraps pgx.ErrNoRows → ErrUserNotFound
     func (r *UserSqrcRepository) Update(ctx, user User) error
     // uses user.ToDto() to get fields
     ```

   - `apps/api/routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.go`
     ```go
     type updateUserUsecase interface {
         Execute(ctx context.Context, userID uuid.UUID, nickname, introduce string) error
     }
     func (h *UpdateUserHandler) PatchUserHandler(w, r)
     // 1. ExtractBearerToken → 401 if missing
     // 2. verifier.GetUserID(token) → 401 if invalid
     // 3. jwtUserID != pathUserID → 403
     // 4. uuid.Parse(pathUserID) → 400 if invalid
     // 5. decode JSON body
     // 6. usecase.Execute(ctx, userID, nickname, introduce)
     //    ErrValidation → 400, ErrUserNotFound → 404, other → 500
     // 7. return { nickname, introduce } from request body (not re-fetched from DB)
     ```

   - `apps/api/routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.go`
     - `GetUserQuery` interface with only `GetUser` method (CQRS query pattern)
     - Directly calls sqlc, no service layer
     - Returns `{ nickname, introduce }`
     - 404 on pgx.ErrNoRows, 500 on other errors

   - `apps/api/main.go`
     - Added imports for `userscommands` and `usersqueries`
     - Registered `GET /v1/users/{userID}` and `PATCH /v1/users/{userID}`

   - Test files (all passing):
     - `user.entity.small.server_test.go`: UpdateProfile boundary tests
     - `get-user.query.handler.small.server_test.go`: mock-based handler tests
     - `update-user.command.handler.small.server_test.go`: JWT auth, 403, 400, 404, 200 tests

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **UpdateUser SQL missing table name**: User wrote `UPDATE SET ...` without `users`; pointed out in review → user fixed
   - **UpdateUser `:one` without RETURNING**: Discussed that since response values are known from request, no need to re-fetch → use `:exec`
   - **Initial design used `handler.go`+`service.go`**: User corrected to use existing CQRS pattern (queries/commands)
   - **Usecase called `user.UpdateProfile` but mock bypassed it**: Test "バリデーションエラー" passed 200 instead of 400 because mock returned nil. Fixed by redesigning: handler passes raw params to usecase, usecase does entity work. Mock now returns `ErrValidation` explicitly.
   - **Test mock signature mismatch** after usecase redesign: `Execute(ctx, User)` vs `Execute(ctx, uuid.UUID, string, string)` → updated mock signatures
   - **LSP false positives** (`db.GetUserRow undefined`, etc.): Actual `go build` succeeds; LSP cache issue, not real errors

5. Problem Solving:
   - Determined PATCH response should return request values directly (not re-fetch from DB) since both values are already known
   - Sentinel error pattern (`ErrValidation`, `ErrUserNotFound`) allows handler to discriminate error types without type assertions
   - `ToDto()` method replaces three individual getter methods per YAGNI principle, since repository needs all three fields anyway
   - JWT user ID comparison done as string comparison (both are UUID strings from JWT sub claim and path parameter)

6. All user messages:
   - "86exb4ex0 実装計画を立てて。ただし、get_user / update_user のクエリは自分で書くからファイルだけ作成してマイグレーションは行わないで。"
   - "ルートハンドラーは handler + service じゃなくて他の合わせてデータ操作系は command, データ取得は query として usecase 実装してほしい"
   - "user entity についての記載がない"
   - "今回は ニックネームの更新なので newUser は扱わない UserFromDto としてバリデーションなしで復元するファクトリー関数を用意してください"
   - "マイグレーション実施しないとなっているけどチケットでは introduce カラムの追加が必要となっていない？"
   - "@agent-docs/チケット管理.md clickup だよ"
   - "get-profile はアクションである必要がありません。通常の関数として定義し、Server Component で呼び出すだけにしてください"
   - "マイグレーションファイルの中身も私が作成する"
   - "UpdateProfile メソッドを用意して"
   - "追記したので中身に問題ないかレビューして"

attachment.planContent:
# 実装計画: プロフィール設定ページ作成（チケット 86exb4ex0）

## Context

ユーザーメニューの「設定」から遷移できる `/settings` ページを作成する。
nickname と自己紹介（introduce）を入力・保存できるプロフィール設定フォームを実装する。
users テーブルには現状 nickname しかないため、マイグレーションで introduce カラムを追加する。

---

## 作業方針

- **マイグレーションファイルは作成する**（000005: introduce カラム追加）、ただし **make migrate-up の実行はしない**（ユーザーが行う）
- **SQLクエリファイルは作成する**（users.sql のみ）、**クエリの中身はユーザーが記述する**
- sqlc generate もユーザーが実行後に進める
- CQRS パターン: データ取得 → queries/、データ操作 → commands/（usecase + entity + repository）
- HTTP メソッドは PATCH（PUT ではない）
- 認証: PATCH は JWT の user_id とパスの userID が一致する場合のみ許可（不一致は 403）

---

## Step 1: マイグレーションファイル作成（ファイル作成のみ・実行しない）

**作成ファイル:** `apps/api/migrations/000005_add_introduce_to_users.up.sql`

ファイルのみ作成（中身はユーザーが記述）

---

## Step 2: SQLクエリファイル作成（ファイル作成のみ・中身はユーザーが記述）

**作成ファイル:** `apps/api/queries/users.sql`

```sql
-- name: GetUser :one
-- ← ユーザーが記述

-- name: UpdateUser :one
-- ← ユーザーが記述
```

ユーザーがクエリを記述・マイグレーション実行後、`make sqlc` で `internal/db/users.sql.go` を生成すること。

---

## Step 3: User エンティティ

**作成ファイル:** `apps/api/routes/users/commands/user.entity.go`

- `User` 型（userID, nickname, introduce を保持）
- `UserFromDto(...)` ファクトリー関数: DB 復元用、バリデーションなし
- `UpdateProfile(nickname, introduce string) error` メソッド: フィールド更新 + バリデーション（nickname 1〜50文字・必須、introduce 0〜500文字）を担う

---

## Step 4: GET ユーザー（Query）

**参考:** `routes/courses/queries/get-courses.query.handler.go`

### 作成ファイル: `apps/api/routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.go`

- `GetUserQuery` インターフェースをファイル内に定義（sqlc の `GetUser` メソッドのみ）
- `GetUserHandler` でパスの userID を UUID パース → sqlc 直接呼び出し
- レスポンス: `{ nickname: string, introduce: string }`
- 404 / 500 のエラーハンドリング

---

## Step 5: PATCH ユーザー（Command）

**参考:** `routes/users/settings/apikeys/` 配下

### 作成ファイル一覧

| ファイル | 役割 |
|---|---|
| `routes/users/commands/user.entity.go` | User エンティティ（UserFromDto ファクトリー） |
| `routes/users/commands/update-user.command.handler.go` | HTTP レイヤー（パース・JWT 照合・usecase 呼び出し） |
| `routes/users/commands/update-user.usecase.go` | ビジネスロジック（repository 経由で DB 更新） |
| `routes/users/commands/user.sqrc-repository.go` | `UpdateUserRepository` インターフェース + sqlc アダプター |

- handler: JWT から user_id を取得し、パスの userID と不一致なら 403 を返す
- バリデーション（handler 層）: nickname 1〜50文字・必須、introduce 0〜500文字
- レスポンス: `{ nickname: string, introduce: string }`

---

## Step 6: ルーティング登録

**変更ファイル:** `apps/api/main.go`

```go
import (
    usersqueries  "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/queries"
    userscommands "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/commands"
)

getUserHandler    := usersqueries.NewGetUserHandler(q)
updateUserHandler := userscommands.NewUpdateUserHandler(
    userscommands.NewUpdateUserUsecase(userscommands.NewUserSqrcRepository(q)),
    verifier,
)

http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}",   getUserHandler.GetUserHandler)
http.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/users/{userID}", updateUserHandler.PatchUserHandler)
```

---

## Step 7: Web 設定ページ実装

### インストール

```
@tanstack/react-form（未導入）を apps/web に追加
```

### 作成ファイル

| ファイル | 役割 |
|---|---|
| `apps/web/app/(main)/settings/page.tsx` | Server Component: `getProfile()` を直接呼び出し → ProfileForm に初期値を渡す |
| `apps/web/app/(main)/settings/_components/profile-form.client.tsx` | Client Component: @tanstack/react-form + valibot でフォーム実装 |
| `apps/web/app/(main)/settings/_actions/update-profile.ts` | Server Action: PATCH /v1/users/{userID} 呼び出し |
| `apps/web/app/(main)/settings/_lib/get-profile.ts` | 通常の非同期関数: GET /v1/users/{userID} 呼び出し（Server Component から直接呼ぶ） |

- バリデーション（valibot スキーマ）: nickname 1〜50文字・必須、introduce 0〜500文字
- フィードバック: 保存成功時はトースト通知、失敗時はフォーム内エラーメッセージ

---

## 実装順序

1. `apps/api/migrations/000005_add_introduce_to_users.up.sql` 作成
2. `apps/api/queries/users.sql` 作成（中身はユーザーが記述）
3. ユーザーがSQLを記述・`make migrate-up` → `make sqlc` を実行
4. `routes/users/commands/user.entity.go` 実装
5. `routes/users/queries/get-user.query.handler.go` 実装
6. `routes/users/commands/` 3ファイル実装
7. `apps/api/main.go` にルート追加
8. `make api-test-all` でテスト通過・`make api-test-coverage` で 80% 確認
9. `@tanstack/react-form` インストール
10. Web 設定ページ実装・ブラウザ動作確認

---

## 検証

- `make api-test-all` テスト通過
- `make api-test-coverage` カバレッジ 80% 以上
- ブラウザで `/settings` 表示・nickname / introduce 更新が反映されること
- PATCH 時に JWT user_id とパス userID が異なる場合に 403 が返ること
- 保存成功でトースト通知・失敗でフォームエラーが表示されること

1	import { createServerClient } from '@supabase/ssr'
2	import { NextResponse, type NextRequest } from 'next/server'
3	
4	export async function proxy(request: NextRequest) {
5	  let supabaseResponse = NextResponse.next({
6	    request,
7	  })
8	
9	  const supabase = createServerClient(
10	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
11	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
12	    {
13	      cookies: {
14	        getAll() {
15	          return request.cookies.getAll()
16	        },
17	        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
18	          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value }) => request.cookies.set(name, value))
19	          supabaseResponse = NextResponse.next({
20	            request,
21	          })
22	          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
23	            supabaseResponse.cookies.set(name, value, options),
24	          )
25	        },
26	      },
27	    },
28	  )
29	
30	  // セッションの更新。getClaims() と次の return の間にロジックを追加しないこと
31	  await supabase.auth.getClaims()
32	
33	  return supabaseResponse
34	}

content.content:
1	---
2	title: How to create forms with Server Actions
3	nav_title: Forms
4	description: Learn how to create forms in Next.js with React Server Actions.
5	---
6	
7	React Server Actions are [Server Functions](https://react.dev/reference/rsc/server-functions) that execute on the server. They can be called in Server and Client Components to handle form submissions. This guide will walk you through how to create forms in Next.js with Server Actions.
8	
9	> [!WARNING]
10	> Always verify [authentication and authorization](/docs/app/guides/authentication) inside each Server Action, even if the form is only rendered on an authenticated page. See the [Data Security guide](/docs/app/guides/data-security) for more details.
11	
12	## How it works
13	
14	React extends the HTML [`<form>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTML/Element/form) element to allow Server Actions to be invoked with the [`action`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Reference/Elements/form#action) attribute.
15	
16	When used in a form, the function automatically receives the [`FormData`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/FormData/FormData) object. You can then extract the data using the native [`FormData` methods](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/FormData#instance_methods):
17	
18	```tsx filename="app/invoices/page.tsx" switcher
19	import { auth } from '@/lib/auth'
20	
21	export default function Page() {
22	  async function createInvoice(formData: FormData) {
23	    'use server'
24	
25	    const session = await auth()
26	    if (!session?.user) {
27	      throw new Error('Unauthorized')
28	    }
29	
30	    const rawFormData = {
31	      customerId: formData.get('customerId'),
32	      amount: formData.get('amount'),
33	      status: formData.get('status'),
34	    }
35	
36	    // mutate data
37	    // revalidate the cache
38	  }
39	
40	  return <form action={createInvoice}>...</form>
41	}
42	```
43	
44	```jsx filename="app/invoices/page.js" switcher
45	import { auth } from '@/lib/auth'
46	
47	export default function Page() {
48	  async function createInvoice(formData) {
49	    'use server'
50	
51	    const session = await auth()
52	    if (!session?.user) {
53	      throw new Error('Unauthorized')
54	    }
55	
56	    const rawFormData = {
57	      customerId: formData.get('customerId'),
58	      amount: formData.get('amount'),
59	      status: formData.get('status'),
60	    }
61	
62	    // mutate data
63	    // revalidate the cache
64	  }
65	
66	  return <form action={createInvoice}>...</form>
67	}
68	```
69	
70	> **Good to know:** When working with forms that have multiple fields, use JavaScript's [`Object.fromEntries()`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Object/fromEntries). For example: `const rawFormData = Object.fromEntries(formData)`. Note that this object will contain extra properties prefixed with `$ACTION_`.
71	
72	## Passing additional arguments
73	
74	Outside of form fields, you can pass additional arguments to a Server Function using the JavaScript [`bind`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Function/bind) method. For example, to pass the `userId` argument to the `updateUser` Server Function:
75	
76	```tsx filename="app/client-component.tsx" highlight={6} switcher
77	'use client'
78	
79	import { updateUser } from './actions'
80

.PHONY: dev migrate-up test-all test-coverage test-coverage-show

DATABASE_URL ?= postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres?sslmode=disable

SUPABASE_URL ?= http://127.0.0.1:54321
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY ?= REDACTED
SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET ?= super-secret-jwt-token-with-at-least-32-characters-long
WEB_ORIGIN ?= http://localhost:60000
COOKIE_SECURE ?= false

export DATABASE_URL
export SUPABASE_URL
export SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
export SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET
export WEB_ORIGIN
export COOKIE_SECURE

help:
	@echo "make dev: 開発サーバー起動（ホットリロード付き）"
	@echo "make migrate-up: マイグレーション実行"
	@echo "make test-all: 全テスト実行（カバレッジ付き）"
	@echo "make test-coverage: カバレッジが80%以上かチェック"
	@echo "make test-coverage-show: カバレッジをブラウザで表示"

dev:
	mkdir -p ./tmp && GOTMPDIR=$(CURDIR)/tmp GOCACHE=$(CURDIR)/tmp/go-cache go tool air

migrate-up:
	migrate -path ./migrations -database "$(DATABASE_URL)" up

db-reset:
	pnpm dlx supabase db reset
	$(MAKE) migrate-up

query-generate:
	sqlc generate

test-all:
	go test -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...

test-coverage-show: test-all
	go tool cover -html=coverage.out

test-coverage:
	@go test -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "NG: テスト失敗"; exit 1)
	@go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$$3); if ($$3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $$3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $$3 "%"}}'

file.content:
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/env"
	libauth "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/txrunner"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/auth"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/commands"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/queries"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/settings/apikeys"
	userscommands "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/commands"
	usersqueries "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/queries"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, env.Require("DATABASE_URL"))
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer pool.Close()

	q := db.New(pool)

	coursesHandler := queries.NewCoursesHandlers(q)
	enrollHandler := commands.NewHandler(commands.NewEnrollCourseUsecase(commands.NewSqrcCourseRepository(q), commands.NewSqrcUserTopicProgressRepository(q)))
	topicDetailHandler := queries.NewTopicDetailHandler(q)
	apikeysHandler := apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyHandler(apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyUsecase(apikeys.NewApiKeySqrcRepository(), txrunner.NewPgxTransactionRunner(pool)))
	verifier := libauth.NewVerifier(env.Require("SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET"), env.Require("SUPABASE_URL"))
	authHandler := auth.NewHandler(verifier)

	getUserHandler := usersqueries.NewGetUserHandler(q)
	updateUserHandler := userscommands.NewUpdateUserHandler(
		userscommands.NewUpdateUserUsecase(userscommands.NewUserSqrcRepository(q)),
		verifier,
	)

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/auth/check", authHandler.CheckHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/courses/{courseId}/enrollment", enrollHandler.PostEnrollmentHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/topics/{topicId}", topicDetailHandler.GetTopicDetailHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/users/{userID}/apikeys", apikeysHandler.GenerateApiKeyHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}", getUserHandler.GetUserHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/users/{userID}", updateUserHandler.PatchUserHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

content.text:
今回実装したファイルの型エラーはなし（`lp/page.tsx` の既存エラーのみ）。

データ取得を `ProfileFormContainer`（Server Component）に移動し、`page.tsx` はレイアウトのみを担当する構成に変更しました。ファイル構成は以下の通りです：

- `page.tsx` — レイアウトのみ、データ取得なし
- `_components/profile-form.container.server.tsx` — 認証チェック＋プロフィール取得
- `_components/profile-form.client.tsx` — フォームUI（@tanstack/react-form + valibot）
- `_lib/get-profile.ts` — GET API呼び出し
- `_actions/update-profile.ts` — PATCH API呼び出し（Server Action）

file.content:
---
paths:
  - *.tsx
---

# コンポーネントアーキテクチャ

- Container / Presentational パターンを基本とする
- データフェッチ・ロジックは Container コンポーネントで行う
- Container コンポーネント内に直接データフェッチ・ロジックを書くのではなく、別ファイルに関数を切り出して Container コンポーネントから呼び出す形にする
- Container コンポーネントは Suspense を使用し、ローディング状態の UI を表示する

content.text:
原因が分かりました。44行目に不正な `fmt.Printf` が残っていて、これが `%!(EXTRA pgtype.UUID=...)` を出しています。かつ `fmt.Printf` はエラーチェックの前にあるため、ユーザーが DB に存在しない場合も `{  }` (ゼロ値の構造体) を出力します。

APIは 404 を返しており → `getProfile()` が `null` → `notFound()` → 404ページ、という流れです。

まずデバッグログを削除します。

content.text:
ただし、デバッグログの削除で解決するのはログの汚染だけです。**根本的な原因は「ログイン済みユーザーが `users` テーブルに存在しない」**ことです。APIが 404 を返すため `getProfile()` が null になり、404ページになっています。

`users` テーブルに該当ユーザーのレコードを INSERT することで解消できます。Supabase ダッシュボードか以下のSQLで確認・追加できます：

```sql
-- ユーザーが存在するか確認
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = '<あなたのuser_id>';

-- 存在しない場合は追加
INSERT INTO users (user_id, nickname) VALUES ('<あなたのuser_id>', 'テスト');
```
